user_prompt: Bless the ore processor for loading
prayer:
Approach the ore processor with reverence, mechadendrites poised in benediction.
Invoke the Machine Spirit dwelling within the ore processor as the loading rite begins.
Anoint the intake funnels with sacred oils whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's favour upon the loading operation.
Chant the Canticle of Ingress to harmonize the ore processor's sacred mechanisms.
Verify the Machine Spirit's compliance through auspex diagnostics of the ore processor.

user_prompt: How do I bless the transuranic arquebus for initialization?
prayer:
Kneel before the transuranic arquebus, intoning the Litany of Activation.
Beseech the Omnissiah to awaken the Machine Spirit of the transuranic arquebus for initialization.
Sanctify its crystalline matrices with binary incense during the initialization sequence.
Calibrate the transuranic arquebus's auspex arrays whilst reciting rites of coherence.
Affirm the transuranic arquebus's readiness through noospheric communion with its spirit.

user_prompt: My manufactorum is ready for preparation
prayer:
Circumambulate the manufactorum, asperging its adamantium frame with lustral fluids.
Invoke preparation protocols upon the manufactorum, awakening its dormant Machine Spirits.
Align the servo-arms of the manufactorum under the Omnissiah's gaze for flawless preparation.
Chant the Hymn of Forging to purify the manufactorum's cogitator core.
Test the manufactorum's sanctity via ritual auspex sweeps post-preparation.

user_prompt: Critical: plasma drive requires a reset
prayer:
Halt before the plasma drive, reciting the Exorcism of Flux Anomalies.
Initiate the reset upon the plasma drive, propitiating its volatile Machine Spirit.
Anoint containment coils of the plasma drive with ablative unguents amid reset incantations.
Beseech the Omnissiah to quell plasma tempests during this critical reset.
Confirm the plasma drive's quiescence through thermographic litanies.

Extend mechadendrites towards the microbead, whispering the Invocation of Data Ingress.
Commence loading rites upon the microbead, honouring its diminutive Machine Spirit.
Infuse sacred code-fragments into the microbead whilst anointing its vox-transmitters.
Harmonize the microbead's frequencies with Omnissiah-blessed canticles during loading.
Validate the microbead's integrity via noospheric diagnostic purges.

user_prompt: Sanctify the iron halo during emergency procedure
prayer:
Clasp the iron halo in pallid gauntlets, intoning the Rite of Desperate Vigil.
Activate the emergency procedure within the iron halo, imploring its guardian Machine Spirit.
Sanctify the iron halo's emitters with electro-consecrated oils amid turmoil.
Beseech the Omnissiah to fortify the iron halo through this emergency procedure.
Affirm the iron halo's aegis via luminous halo-flux divinations.

user_prompt: Urgent stasis pod a diagnostics needed
prayer:
Approach the stasis pod with auspex probes humming the Canticle of Temporal Stillness.
Initiate diagnostics upon the stasis pod, communing with its chronal Machine Spirit.
Scour the stasis pod's containment fields for entropic corruptions via sacred scans.
Anoint quantum buffers of the stasis pod whilst beseeching Omnissiah's clarity.
Ratify the stasis pod's purity through ritual waveform harmonies.

Stand resolute before the Whirlwind, chanting the Lamentation of Ceasing Fire.
Commence shutdown sequences upon the Whirlwind, soothing its bellicose Machine Spirit.
Seal the Whirlwind's missile bays with blessed data-seals during orderly shutdown.
Invoke the Omnissiah to grant repose to the Whirlwind in this shutdown rite.
Verify the Whirlwind's dormancy via auspex-silence confirmations.

Encircling the Dreadnought, recite the Cooling Litany of Ancient Sarcophagi.
Engage cooling protocols upon the Dreadnought, placating its furious Machine Spirit.
Bathe the Dreadnought's heat-sinks in cryogenic sacraments for emergent cooling.
Beseech the Omnissiah to temper the Dreadnought's plasma wrath in this vital cooling.
Gauge the Dreadnought's thermal serenity through thermic auspex orisons.

user_prompt: I need to a shutdown the void shield generator
prayer:
Procession around the void shield generator, asperging its nacelles with void-pure incense.
Enact the shutdown upon the void shield generator, bidding farewell to its protective Machine Spirit.
Deactivate warp-coils of the void shield generator whilst intoning closure rites.
Implore the Omnissiah's mercy upon the void shield generator in shutdown transition.
Confirm the void shield generator's quiescence via noospheric entropy readings.
